title: Energy Use Intensity (EUI) Definition
summary: EUI is total energy consumed by the building in one year divided by total gross floor area.
evidence_quote:
EUI: Energy Use Intensity
𝑡𝑜𝑡𝑎𝑙  𝑒𝑛𝑒𝑟𝑔𝑦  𝑐𝑜𝑛𝑠𝑢𝑚𝑒𝑑  𝑏𝑦 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑏𝑢𝑖𝑙𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔  𝑖𝑛 𝑜𝑛𝑒 𝑦𝑒𝑎𝑟  (𝑚𝑒𝑎𝑠𝑢𝑟𝑒𝑑  𝑖𝑛 𝑘𝐵𝑡𝑢  𝑜𝑟 𝐺𝐽)
𝑡𝑜𝑡𝑎𝑙  𝑔𝑟𝑜𝑠𝑠  𝑓𝑙𝑜𝑜𝑟  𝑎𝑟𝑒𝑎  𝑜𝑓 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑏𝑢𝑖𝑙𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔  (𝑚𝑒𝑎𝑠𝑢𝑟𝑒𝑑  𝑖𝑛 𝑠𝑞𝑢𝑎𝑟𝑒  𝑓𝑒𝑒𝑡  𝑜𝑟 𝑠𝑞𝑢𝑎𝑟𝑒  𝑚𝑒𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑠 )=𝐾𝑏𝑡𝑢
𝑆𝑄𝑓𝑡𝑜𝑟 (𝐺𝐽
𝑆𝑄𝑀)

title: Energy Cost Index (ECI) Definition
summary: ECI is total cost of energy consumed by the building in one year divided by total gross floor area.
evidence_quote:
ECI: Energy Cost Index
𝑡𝑜𝑡𝑎𝑙  𝑐𝑜𝑠𝑡  𝑒𝑛𝑒𝑟𝑔𝑦  𝑐𝑜𝑛𝑠𝑢𝑚𝑒𝑑  𝑏𝑦 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑏𝑢𝑖𝑙𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔  𝑖𝑛 𝑜𝑛𝑒 𝑦𝑒𝑎𝑟  (𝑚𝑒𝑎𝑠𝑢𝑟𝑒𝑑  𝑖𝑛 $)
𝑡𝑜𝑡𝑎𝑙  𝑔𝑟𝑜𝑠𝑠  𝑓𝑙𝑜𝑜𝑟  𝑎𝑟𝑒𝑎  𝑜𝑓 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑏𝑢𝑖𝑙𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔  (𝑚𝑒𝑎𝑠𝑢𝑟𝑒𝑑  𝑖𝑛 𝑠𝑞𝑢𝑎𝑟𝑒  𝑓𝑒𝑒𝑡  𝑜𝑟 𝑠𝑞𝑢𝑎𝑟𝑒  𝑚𝑒𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑠 )=$
𝑆𝑄𝑓𝑡𝑜𝑟 ($
𝑆𝑄𝑀)

title: Preliminary Energy Use Analysis Data Sources
summary: Data sources for preliminary energy use analysis include utility bills and schedules for at least one calendar year.
evidence_quote: Data Sources: utility bills, schedules (min. 1 calendar year)

title: Preliminary Energy Use Analysis Key Metrics
summary: Key metrics for preliminary energy use analysis are EUI and ECI.

title: ASHRAE 211-2018 Audit Levels
summary: ASHRAE 211-2018 establishes energy audit levels 1, 2, and 3.

title: ASHRAE 211-2018 Minimum Performance Standard
summary: ASHRAE 211-2018 establishes a minimum performance standard for energy audits.
evidence_quote: Establishes a minimum performance standard for energy audits

title: Report Structure Executive Summary Content
summary: Executive summary includes brief background, scope summary, EEM summary table, and benchmarking results summary.
evidence_quote:
1. Executive Summary
• Brief background and summary of scope
• EEM (Energy Efficiency Measures) summary table
• Summary of benchmarking results

title: Report Structure Background Information Content
summary: Background information includes contact info, audit scope, site description, historical energy consumption, benchmarking, end-use analysis, and client motivations.
evidence_quote:
2. Background Information
• Contact information for stakeholders
• Audit scope, methodology
• Description of the site and the building
• Historical energy consumption and costs
• Benchmarking results
• End-use analysis results
• Client motivations or mandates satisfied by this effort

title: Report Structure Existing Building Systems Content
summary: Description of existing building systems includes occupancy, envelope, lighting, mechanical systems, security/operational requirements, and photographs.
evidence_quote:
3. Description of the Existing Building Systems
• Occupancy
• Building envelope
• Lighting systems
• Mechanical systems
• Security, oversight, or operational requirements impacting this effort
• Photographs

title: Report Structure Energy Efficiency Measures Content
summary: Energy efficiency measures section includes no-cost/low-cost, capital investment, demand response, distributed generation/renewable energy, O&M measures, and financial impact.
evidence_quote:
4. Energy Efficiency Measures
• No-cost/low-cost measures
• Capital investment measures
• Demand response measures
• Distributed generation/renewable energy measures
• O&M measures
• Impact of current financial market, utility incentives, federal tax or grant support, etc.

title: Report Structure Supporting Information Content
summary: Supporting information includes analysis, measured data, manufacturers' cut sheets, plans, sketches, and additional specifications.
evidence_quote:
Supporting Information
• Analysis
• Measured data or monitoring results
• Manufacturers’ information or “cut sheets”
• Plans and sketches
• Additional information or specifications

title: Preliminary Energy Use Analysis Purpose
summary: Preliminary energy use analysis provides a baseline overview of building energy performance and early stage benchmarking.
evidence_quote:
Preliminary Energy Use Analysis:
•Baseline overview of building's energy performance
•Early Stage Benchmarking

title: Preliminary Energy Use Analysis Informs Audit Depth
summary: Preliminary energy use analysis informs depth and focus of the main audit.
evidence_quote: Informs depth & focus of main audit

title: ASHRAE 211-2018 Complements PCBEA
summary: ASHRAE 211-2018 is a complement to the PCBEA.

title: ASHRAE 211-2018 Brings Order to Energy Audits
summary: ASHRAE 211-2018 brings order into chaos of energy audits.
evidence_quote: Brings order into chaos of Energy Audits
